reviews.comment:
Estación de servicio a la que le hizo la competencia otra YPF a unos pocos kilómetros

(Translated by Google)
Service station that competed with another YPF station a few kilometers away

reviews.comment:
Para una parada en medio del viaje a la costa. Baños impecables. El Full es amplio. Generalmente tenes atención enseguida.

(Translated by Google)
A great stopover on the way to the coast. Spotless bathrooms. The Full package is spacious. You usually get prompt service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURneG8zSGV3EAE

reviews.comment:
Parada obligatoria cuando voy a la costa. Excelente servicio.

(Translated by Google)
A must-stop when I go to the coast. Excellent service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xSSmRETnRUa0p6U1Vsd1oyTTRNa0ZFVjJsTFVWRRAB

reviews.comment:
Pare para tomar un cafecito y seguir en la noche de la ruta 2. Baños super limpios. La atención de la chica rubia, muy bien.

(Translated by Google)
Stop for a coffee and continue the night on Route 2. The bathrooms are super clean. The service from the blonde girl was excellent.
